description.en:
Adds Red Holstein, Ayrshire, Charolais, and Shorthorn cow breeds with texture variation to Realistic Livestock RM.
Requires Realistic Livestock - Ritter version (FS25_RealisticLivestockRM).
description.de:
Fuegt Red Holstein, Ayrshire, Charolais und Shorthorn Rinderrassen mit Texturvariationen zu Realistic Livestock RM hinzu.
Benoetigt Realistic Livestock - Ritter version (FS25_RealisticLivestockRM).
